payload.title: DB migration: add rank column (SQLite v5 + Postgres)
payload.description: SQLite: bump CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION 4->5 (src/db.js), ALTER TABLE tickets ADD COLUMN rank REAL, backfill rank=number for existing rows. Postgres: add rank column to tickets via idempotent ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS (src/pg/schema.js). Both cache tables are rebuildable from the event log, so the backfill is derived, not a source-of-truth change.
